name: VOD Annotator
description: A video-on-demand playback surface with timeline annotation flags, drawing overlay tools, tag filtering, and replay markers for esports coaching review.

standard.description: Single video player with annotation timeline beneath, drawing overlay on top of video, and tag-filtering chip rail along the bottom

multi-angle.description: Synchronized grid of player POV video feeds viewed simultaneously with shared timeline and aligned annotation markers across all angles

heatmap.description: Timeline heatmap overlay showing aggregated play frequency and annotation density across the VOD duration for pattern-spotting review

visual_brief: A dark-background coaching surface. Large 16:9 video player at top with standard playback controls (play/pause, scrub, time, speed, volume, fullscreen) overlaid at bottom of the video on hover. A transparent drawing overlay sits atop the video, enabled by toolbar toggle, allowing arrows, circles, rectangles, and freehand lines in brand-accent colors. Directly below the player, an annotation timeline strip spans full width with colored marker flags planted at annotation timestamps (color encodes tag type: red=mistake, green=highlight, blue=rotation, purple=teamfight, amber=objective). Hovering a flag reveals a mini-preview thumbnail and annotation text. A horizontal tag chip rail below timeline acts as filters — click a chip to hide/show flag types. Each annotation in the list has a replay button that jumps to that timestamp and loops the moment. Commenter avatars appear as small circles on each flag showing who created it.

layout_hints.note: Video player must be 16:9 aspect. Drawing overlay must be toggleable to avoid interfering with scrub controls.
layout_hints.tag_colors: Tag color semantics must stay consistent across annotations: mistake=red, highlight=green, rotation=blue, teamfight=purple, objective=amber.

slots.video-player: 16:9 HTML5 or custom video element with playback controls overlay, scrub bar, speed, volume, fullscreen.
slots.drawing-overlay: Transparent SVG canvas layered over the video supporting arrows, shapes, freehand drawing with brand-accent colors.
slots.annotation-timeline: Horizontal strip beneath video showing marker-flag planted at each annotation timestamp, synchronized with playback.
slots.marker-flag: Repeating colored flag element on timeline. Color encodes tag type. Click jumps to timestamp.
slots.tag-chip: Filter chip in bottom rail toggling visibility of a tag category across markers.
slots.replay-button: Button beside each annotation list entry that seeks and loops the annotated moment.

keyboard: N: create new annotation at current timestamp

responsive.mobile: Tag chip rail scrolls horizontally. Drawing tools move to bottom action sheet. Multi-angle collapses to single view with tab switcher.
responsive.tablet: Standard layout retained. Timeline marker size reduced.

micro.flag-hover: marker scale(1.3) + preview thumbnail slide-up 180ms ease-out

transitions.drawing-draw: stroke path draw-in with follow-cursor immediate

ambient.playhead-pulse: timeline playhead subtle glow pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite while playing

composition.VodAnnotator: Section(d-section) > [VideoPlayer(16:9) > [VideoElement + DrawingOverlay + PlaybackControls] + AnnotationTimeline > MarkerFlag[] + TagChipRail > TagChip[] + AnnotationList > AnnotationEntry[] > [Timestamp + TagBadge + AuthorAvatar + NoteText + ReplayButton]]
composition.VideoPlayer: Player(aspect-16-9) > [Video + Overlays + Controls(scrub, play, speed, vol, fs)]
